fields.explainEn: Name of the collector.
Identifier of the data entry.

fields.explainZh: 表示保证可供Java虚拟机使用的内存量。
fields.explainEn: Size of available memory for the JVM.

fields.explainZh: 表示Java虚拟机在启动期间从操作系统请求用于内存管理的初始内存量（字节）。Java虚拟机可能会从操作系统请求额外内存，也可能会随着时间的推移向系统释放内存。init的值为0时表示未定义。
fields.explainEn: Size (in bytes) of initial memory that the JVM requests from the OS for memory management when the JVM starts up. The JVM might request additional memory from the OS or release memory to the OS over time. Value 0 represents the value is not defined.

fields.explainZh: 表示可以用于内存管理的最大内存量(以字节为单位)。为-1是表示未定义其值。如果定义了该值,最大内存量可能随时间而更改。已使用的内存量和已提 交的内存量将始终小于或等于 max(如果定义了 max)。如果内存分配试图增加满足以下条件的已使用内存将会失败:used > committed,即使 used <= max 仍然为 true(例如,当系统的虚拟内存不足时)。
fields.explainEn: Maximum size of memory used for memory management, in bytes. Value -1 indicates that the value is not defined. If the value is defined, it might change over time. The size of used memory or available memory is always smaller than or equal to the maximum memory size.If the used memory size is larger than the available memory size, the system will fail to enlarge the used memory size regardless of the maximum memory size. This scenario applies when the system does not have sufficient virtual memory.
Memory area of the JVM.

fields.explainZh: 表示当前使用的内存量（字节）。
fields.explainEn: Size of memory being used, in bytes.
Error Requests.
URL.

fields.explainZh: 指得到响应的平均时间。
fields.explainEn: Average response Time.
JSP Requests.
Name.
Name of the collector.
Identifier of the data entry.

fields.explainZh: 表示保证可供Java虚拟机使用的内存量。
fields.explainEn: Size of available memory for the JVM.

fields.explainZh: 表示Java虚拟机在启动期间从操作系统请求用于内存管理的初始内存量（字节）。Java虚拟机可能会从操作系统请求额外内存，也可能会随着时间的推移向系统释放内存。init的值为0时表示未定义。
fields.explainEn: Size (in bytes) of initial memory that the JVM requests from the OS for memory management when the JVM starts up. The JVM might request additional memory from the OS or release memory to the OS over time. Value 0 represents the value is not defined.

fields.explainZh: 表示可以用于内存管理的最大内存量(以字节为单位)。为-1是表示未定义其值。如果定义了该值,最大内存量可能随时间而更改。已使用的内存量和已提 交的内存量将始终小于或等于 max(如果定义了 max)。如果内存分配试图增加满足以下条件的已使用内存将会失败:used > committed,即使 used <= max 仍然为 true(例如,当系统的虚拟内存不足时)。
fields.explainEn: Maximum size of memory used for memory management, in bytes. Value -1 indicates that the value is not defined. If the value is defined, it might change over time. The size of used memory or available memory is always smaller than or equal to the maximum memory size.If the used memory size is larger than the available memory size, the system will fail to enlarge the used memory size regardless of the maximum memory size. This scenario applies when the system does not have sufficient virtual memory.
Memory area of the JVM.

fields.explainZh: 表示当前使用的内存量（字节）。
fields.explainEn: Size of memory being used, in bytes.

fields.explainZh: 最大连接数满了后允许进入阻塞队列的网络连接数。
fields.explainEn: Number of connections that can enter the queue when the maximum number of connections is reached.

fields.explainZh: 最大连接数与急救连接数之和。
fields.explainEn: otal number of maximum connections and excessive connections.

fields.explainZh: 当前存活的网络连接数。
fields.explainEn: Number of connections that are currently active.

fields.explainZh: 当前存活连接数与允许最大连接数的比值。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of active connections to acceptable connections.

fields.explainZh: 客户端与Tomcat server建立网络连接的最大数。
fields.explainEn: Maximum number of connections that can be established between the client and the Tomcat server.

fields.explainZh: 服务器CPU非空闲时间与CPU总时间比值。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of the server CPU non-idle duration to the total server CPU running duration.

fields.explainZh: Tomcat进程占用时间与CPU总时间比值。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of the duration for which the Tomcat process occupied the CPU to the total server CPU running duration.
Total number of major gc tasks.
Total time spent by major gc.
Total number of minor gc tasks.
Total time spent by minor gc.
Version of the Tomcat.
Name of the collector.
Number of threads for the GC.
Total number of GC tasks.

fields.explainZh: 最近一次GC花费的总时间。
fields.explainEn: Total duration of the most recent GC.
Whether the collector is valid.

fields.explainZh: Tomcat启动到最近一次轮询接收和发送的字节总数。
fields.explainEn: Number of sent and received bytes from the Tomcat start time to the last polling time.
Current Threads.
Threads Used.

fields.explainZh: 核心线程数不够时，允许再创建出的线程数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of threads can be created when the core threads are not sufficient.
Errors.

fields.explainZh: 当前采集周期请求失败数与总请求数比值。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of failed requests to total requests in the current collection interval.

fields.explainZh: 当活动线程数等于允许最大线程数时，依然有请求进来，新的请求就会阻塞。
fields.explainEn: When the number of active threads reaches the number of acceptable threads, new requests that come in cause blocks.

fields.explainZh: 核心线程数与急救线程数之和。
fields.explainEn: Total number of core threads and excessive threads.

fields.explainZh: Tomcat启动时初始化的线程数量。
fields.explainEn: Number of core threads that Tomcat initialized when starting.

fields.explainZh: 指得到响应的平均时间。
fields.explainEn: Average response time.
Successes.

fields.explainZh: 当前存活现场数与允许最大线程数比值。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of active threads to acceptable threads.

fields.explainZh: Tomcat启动到最近一次轮询总共接收的请求数。
fields.explainEn: Total number of requests received from the Tomcat start time to the last polling time.
Number of cores available on the CPU.

fields.explainZh: 数据在网络传输时是否开启压缩，如开启会将数据先压缩成小文件再传输从而加快整体效率。通常都会启用该功能。
fields.explainEn: Whether to compress data transmitted in the network to enhance efficiency. This feature is typically enabled.

fields.explainZh: 当传输的数据大于阈值设定时，会触发Gzip压缩。
fields.explainEn: Threshold for determining whether to compress transmitted data.
Time when Tomcat was most recently started..
Time the tomcat has been up and running.
Version of the JVM.
Free memory of the Tomcat application.
Total memory allocated to the Tomcat application.
Memory used by the Tomcat application.
Memory usage of the Tomcat application.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
